text:
In the first image, I feel a sense of distance and quietude. The glass walls separate me from the lone figure inside, creating both transparency and isolation. I am both observer and participant, aware of my position on the periphery, pondering the boundaries we construct between ourselves.

In the second image, surrounded by words and technological motifs, I feel inspired and curious. The vibrant, informative wall invites contemplation about the meaning of development and innovation. Here, my mind plays with ideas—about progress, connection, and our place among inventions. I am present, yet my thoughts are drawn onward into possibility.
